ddls:
CREATE TABLE "legations" (
  "legation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legation */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the legation was established */,
  "legation_name" TEXT /* Name of the legation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the legation was established */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Type of diplomatic event (e.g., establish legation) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the legation location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the legation location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City or region where the legation was established */,
  "legation_type" TEXT /* Type of diplomatic mission (e.g., embassy, consulate) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the legation (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Historical significance of the legation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., establish legation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "legation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the legation data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the legation data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the legation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_legation_id FOREIGN KEY ("legation_id") REFERENCES legations ("legation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "legation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legation being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_legation_id FOREIGN KEY ("legation_id") REFERENCES legations ("legation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeline" (
  "timeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeline event */,
  "legation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legation in the timeline */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event in the timeline */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event in the timeline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event in the timeline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timeline_legation_id FOREIGN KEY ("legation_id") REFERENCES legations ("legation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timeline_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
